role: This directory contains the core configuration and architectural rule definitions for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively, these components define file scanning and ignore policies, hook settings, artifact distribution strategy, initialization tracking, and enforceable architectural guidelines (layered structure and naming conventions) to ensure consistency, maintainability, and separation of concerns across the entire ArchSpine project.

children.role: Core configuration for the ArchSpine mirror system
Contains formal rule definitions for architecture and code style to enforce consistency and layering discipline in the ArchSpine project.
